code: import{useState}from"react";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Addon=()=>{const[TaskName,SetTaskName]=useState("");const[TaskDetails,SetTaskDetails]=useState("");const[Taskstatus,SetTaskstatus]=useState("Yet to start");const history=useNavigate();const handlesubmit=e=>{e.preventDefault();const TaskUploads={TaskName,TaskDetails,Taskstatus};fetch("http://localhost:8000/TaskUploads",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json","ngrok-skip-browser-warning":"true"},body:JSON.stringify(TaskUploads)}).then(()=>{history('/');console.log("Data has been added");}).catch(err=>{console.error("Error submitting form:",err);});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"create",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"New Task"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handlesubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Task Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",value:TaskName,onChange:e=>SetTaskName(e.target.value),placeholder:"Task Name",required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Detail of the task"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("textarea",{value:TaskDetails,onChange:e=>SetTaskDetails(e.target.value),placeholder:"Detail of the Task",required:true}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("label",{children:"Status"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("select",{value:Taskstatus,onChange:e=>SetTaskstatus(e.target.value),placeholder:"select",required:true,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"Yet to start",children:"Yet to start"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"In Progress",children:"In Progress"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("option",{value:"Completed",children:"Completed"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",children:"Save"})]})]});};export default Addon;
